programme.desc: Nikolaj meets some inspiring engineers, mechanics and entrepreneurs who may have solutions to help humans continue moving in environmentally friendly ways.

programme.desc: Things get off to a prickly start as TV personality, restaurateur, author, and philanthropist Aarón Sánchez has Selena wrangle a seafood soirée, but on the other side awaits a tower of crab ravigote and mango lobster ceviche.

programme.title: Casino Royale
programme.desc: After receiving a license to kill, British Secret Service agent James Bond heads to Madagascar, where he uncovers a link to Le Chiffre, a man who finances terrorist organizations. Learning that Le Chiffre plans to raise money in a high-stakes poker game, MI6 sends Bond to play against him, gambling that their newest "00" operative will topple the man's organization.

programme.title: Obsessed to Death
programme.desc: Cassie becomes obsessed with the woman who stole her man away from her.

programme.title: Sharp Corner
programme.desc: A troubled man begins to spiral, consumed by the fatal car crashes caused by the sharp corner in front of his house. As his sick obsession takes hold, he places his wife and son in jeopardy, threatening to permanently break the family apart.

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent realizes that Corner Gas may not actually be within the town of Dog River.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Emma gives Davis and Wanda piano lessons; Lacey deals with a broken arm.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash has a major realization; Mags faces an overwhelming health crisis; Devi stands behind her choices; June confronts loss; Theo witnesses a devastating event.

programme.title: The Christmas Retreat
programme.desc: When Kim's boyfriend breaks up with her instead of proposing, Kim's mom takes her away to a Christmas retreat to reconnect with the spirit of the holiday. When she gets there, she meets newly unemployed Mark.

programme.title: Elli and Her Monster Team
programme.desc: A homeless ghost seeking belonging at a Ghost Train draws unwanted outside attention, forcing her and its monster residents to embark on a quest to save their home and her chance at finding family.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj begins his global journey to find out how to tell dusk from dawn in the age of climate change; from the scientists behind carbon neutral jet fuel to the oceanographer creating cloud cover for the Great Barrier Reef, the answer becomes clear.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Shelter is one of humanity's most basic needs; but as the global population grows, so does the construction industry's environmental footprint.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: A look at nature's amazing ability to regenerate, and how we can harness this innate power to solve the problems we face.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Global warming has made growing food much harder and a need to adapt to climate change is highly important; Nikolaj explores how people can rethink what they plant, where they plant it and how they harvest and prepare it.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj meets some inspiring engineers, mechanics and entrepreneurs who may have solutions to help humans continue moving in environmentally friendly ways.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj's journey toward hope continues as he searches for innovators transforming and revitalizing the world.

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: While investigating mysterious activities in the world diamond market, 007 (Sean Connery) discovers that his evil nemesis Blofeld (Charles Gray) is stockpiling the gems to use in his deadly laser satellite. With the help of beautiful smuggler Tiffany Case (Jill St. John), Bond sets out to stop the madman -- as the fate of the world hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Scream VI
programme.desc: Four survivors of the Ghostface murders leave Woodsboro behind for a fresh start in New York City. However, they soon find themselves in a fight for their lives when a new killer embarks on a bloody rampage.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Noah and Megan find a long-buried corpse in their parents' basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating web of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.
